steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: In She typically ___ them, the blank is the only verb in the clause. It must be a finite present-tense verb that agrees with the singular subject She.

steps.title: Check the verb forms
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are nonfinite forms, and Choice D is also an infinitive phrase. Choice C, weaves, is the third-person singular present verb needed for the subject. The answer is C.
